title: Validation Results
description: Normalized validation outcomes produced by portfolio workers, the slice-agent-runner, and local IDE runs. The same shape is used in Evidence Contract validation_results and standalone run artifacts for cross-runtime parity.

checks.description: Individual validation check results in execution order.

runtime.description: Optional runtime label for parity auditing (cursor-cloud, local-cli, github-actions, slice-agent-runner).

source.description: Optional producer identifier (adapter type, script name, or worker role).

check_name.description: Stable check identifier or short label.

command.description: Exact shell command that was executed.

exit_code.description: Process exit code. Zero means success.
